EndUserProfileSystemProperties.title: EndUserProfileSystemProperties

avatar.description: URL to the end user's avatar image

language.description: The end user's language in BCP 47 format

metadata.description: A dictionary of arbitrary key, value pairs assigned to the end user                      - `metadata` keys may only be of type: `string`                      - `metadata` values may only be one of type: `string`, `boolean`, or `integer`

system_properties.description: Read-only profile information set by Ada

end_user_id.description: The unique Ada-generated id for the end user

external_id.description: Caller-supplied identifier that links this end user to your own system (for example a CRM contact ID or a phone number). Unique per AI Agent. Null if not set. Maximum 36 characters; values are case-insensitive. Available for custom channel integrations only (V1).

created_at.description: The date and time the end user was created

updated_at.description: The date and time the end user was updated

fields.description: A dictionary of sensitive key-value pairs. Keys must match the pattern [A-Za-z0-9_-]+. Values must be non-empty strings, booleans, integers, or null. Setting a key to null removes the metavariable. Maximum 20 key-value pairs per request.

EndUserRequestProfileSensitiveMetadata.description: Sensitive key-value pairs to update on the end user. Values are stored in an encrypted, isolated store and are never returned in any API response, dashboard view, conversation transcript, or LLM prompt. Values are automatically and permanently deleted after 24 hours.
EndUserRequestProfileSensitiveMetadata.title: EndUserRequestProfileSensitiveMetadata

avatar.description: URL to the end user's avatar image

language.description: The end user's language in BCP 47 format

metadata.description:
A dictionary of arbitrary key, value pairs assigned to the end user.
- `metadata` keys may only be of type: `string`
- `metadata` values may only be one of type: `string`, `boolean`, or `integer`
**Note**: The total size of metadata is limited to 10KB.

sensitive_metadata.description: Sensitive key-value pairs to update on the end user. Values are stored in an encrypted, isolated store and are never returned in any API response, dashboard view, conversation transcript, or LLM prompt. Values are automatically and permanently deleted after 24 hours.

external_id.description: Set or update the external identifier for this end user. Pass null to remove the current external_id. Must be unique per AI Agent; maximum 36 characters; must not contain < or > characters. Values are stored case-insensitively. Returns 409 if the external_id is already assigned to a different end user. Available for custom channel integrations only (V1).

next_page_url.description: Link to the next page of data using a cursor value

CursorPaginationMetadata.description: Metadata returned with the results including but not limited to a link to the next page of data
CursorPaginationMetadata.title: CursorPaginationMetadata

data.description: The list of end user profiles

fields.description: A dictionary of sensitive key-value pairs. Keys must match the pattern [A-Za-z0-9_-]+. Values must be non-empty strings, booleans, integers, or null. Maximum 20 key-value pairs per request. Keys must not overlap with keys in the sibling metadata field.

CreateEndUserRequestProfileSensitiveMeta.description: Sensitive key-value pairs to associate with the end user at creation time. Values are stored in an encrypted, isolated store and are never returned in any API response, dashboard view, conversation transcript, or LLM prompt. Values are automatically and permanently deleted after 24 hours.
CreateEndUserRequestProfileSensitiveMeta.title: CreateEndUserRequestProfileSensitiveMetadata

language.description: The end user's language in BCP 47 format

metadata.description:
A dictionary of arbitrary key, value pairs assigned to the end user.

**Note**: The total size of metadata is limited to 10KB.

sensitive_metadata.description: Sensitive key-value pairs to associate with the end user at creation time. Values are stored in an encrypted, isolated store and are never returned in any API response, dashboard view, conversation transcript, or LLM prompt. Values are automatically and permanently deleted after 24 hours.

CreateEndUserRequestProfile.description: The end user's profile information. Optional — omitting profile creates a blank end user.
CreateEndUserRequestProfile.title: CreateEndUserRequestProfile

external_id.description: Optional caller-supplied identifier (for example a CRM contact ID or a phone number). Maximum 36 characters; must not contain < or > characters. Values are stored case-insensitively. If an end user with this external_id already exists, that existing user is returned with HTTP 200 (idempotent upsert); otherwise a new end user is created with HTTP 201. Available for custom channel integrations only (V1).

profile.description: The end user's profile information. Optional — omitting profile creates a blank end user.
